action_mappings.release_scanning_terminal: release scanning terminal {} from high risk release task {}
action_mappings.use_scanning_terminal_for_check: use scanning terminal {} for checking high risk release task {}
action_mappings.record_nurse_witness_signature: record signature of nurse witness {} for high risk release task {}

action_mappings.release_drug_lot: release drug lot {} from high risk release task {}

action_mappings.release_dispensing_location: release dispensing location {} from high risk release task {}

action_mappings.release_administration_protocol: release administration protocol {} from high risk release task {}

action_mappings.release_prescriber_link: release prescriber {} link from high risk release task {}

action_mappings.perform_order_clinical_verification_with: perform clinical verification with protocol for high risk release task {} linked to medication order {} using administration protocol {} for patient identifier {}
action_mappings.clear_secondary_check_trigger: clear secondary check trigger for high risk release task {} associated with drug lot {} at dispensing location {}
action_mappings.complete_secondary_check_with_pharmacy_w: complete secondary check for high risk release task {} with pharmacy witness staff {} associated with drug lot {} at dispensing location {}

action_mappings.finalize_checks_and_mark_ready: finalize checks and mark high risk release task {} ready for final signoff with drug lot {} at dispensing location {}

action_mappings.attach_authorization_to_task_via_doc: attach authorization document {} to high risk release task {} via document
action_mappings.variant_b_record_authorization: record authorization for release task variant b {} using authorization document {} linked to release task variant a {}
action_mappings.record_quality_review_for_variant: record quality review for release task {} using scanning terminal {} with quality document {}
action_mappings.final_signoff_variant_a: perform final signoff for variant a of release task {}
action_mappings.final_signoff_with_authorization: perform final signoff with authorization for release task {} using authorization document {}
action_mappings.final_signoff_with_quality_review: perform final signoff with quality review for release task {}

action_mappings_indef.release_scanning_terminal: release a scanning terminal {} from a high risk release task {}
action_mappings_indef.use_scanning_terminal_for_check: use a scanning terminal {} for checking a high risk release task {}
action_mappings_indef.record_nurse_witness_signature: record signature of a nurse witness {} for a high risk release task {}
action_mappings_indef.attach_quality_document_and_mark: attach a quality document {} to a high risk release task {} and mark at a scanning terminal {}
action_mappings_indef.apply_authorization_document_check: apply authorization document check on a high risk release task {} with an authorization document {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_drug_lot: reserve a drug lot {} for a high risk release task {}
action_mappings_indef.release_drug_lot: release a drug lot {} from a high risk release task {}
action_mappings_indef.reserve_dispensing_location: reserve a dispensing location {} for a high risk release task {}
action_mappings_indef.release_dispensing_location: release a dispensing location {} from a high risk release task {}

action_mappings_indef.release_administration_protocol: release an administration protocol {} from a high risk release task {}

action_mappings_indef.release_prescriber_link: release a prescriber {} link from a high risk release task {}
action_mappings_indef.perform_order_clinical_verification: perform clinical verification for a high risk release task {} linked to a medication order {} with a drug lot {} at a dispensing location {}
action_mappings_indef.perform_order_clinical_verification_with: perform clinical verification with protocol for a high risk release task {} linked to a medication order {} using an administration protocol {} for a patient identifier {}
action_mappings_indef.clear_secondary_check_trigger: clear secondary check trigger for a high risk release task {} associated with a drug lot {} at a dispensing location {}
action_mappings_indef.complete_secondary_check_with_pharmacy_w: complete secondary check for a high risk release task {} with a pharmacy witness staff {} associated with a drug lot {} at a dispensing location {}
action_mappings_indef.complete_secondary_check_with_secondary_: complete secondary check for a high risk release task {} with a secondary checker {} associated with an administration protocol {} and linked to a prescriber {}

predicate_mappings.assigned_primary_pharmacist: the primary pharmacist {} is assigned to the task {}
predicate_mappings.pharmacist_reserved: a pharmacist is reserved for the task {}
predicate_mappings.quality_document_attached: a quality document is attached to {}
predicate_mappings.task_reserved_drug_lot: {} is a task reserved for the drug lot {}
predicate_mappings.task_reserved_dispensing_location: {} is a task reserved for the dispensing location {}
predicate_mappings.task_reserved_protocol: {} is a task reserved for the administration protocol {}
predicate_mappings.task_prescriber_linked: {} is a task linked to the prescriber {}
predicate_mappings.order_marked_approved: {} is a release task marked approved for the medication order {}
predicate_mappings.clinical_verification_flag: the clinical verification flag is set for {}
predicate_mappings.secondary_check_completed: the secondary check is completed for {}
predicate_mappings.device_scan_verified: the device scan is verified for {}
predicate_mappings.witness_signature_recorded: the witness signature for {} is recorded
predicate_mappings.authorization_attached: the authorization document {} is attached to the release task {}
predicate_mappings.quality_review_completed: the quality review for the release task {} is completed
predicate_mappings.eligible_primary_pharmacist: the primary pharmacist {} is eligible for the release task {}
predicate_mappings.task_linked_medication_order: the release task {} is linked to the medication order {}
predicate_mappings.task_can_reserve_drug_lot: the release task {} can reserve the drug lot {}
predicate_mappings.task_can_reserve_dispensing_location: the release task {} can reserve the dispensing location {}
predicate_mappings.task_can_reserve_protocol: the release task {} can reserve the protocol {}
predicate_mappings.task_patient_identifier_linked: the release task {} is linked to the patient identifier {}
predicate_mappings.task_prescriber_association: the release task {} is associated with the prescriber {}
predicate_mappings.task_role_available: the task role {} is available for the release task {}
predicate_mappings.task_authorization_link: the release task {} is linked to the authorization document {}
predicate_mappings.variant_a_task: the release task variant a is {}
predicate_mappings.variant_b_task: the release task variant b is {}
predicate_mappings.task_reserved_scanning_terminal: the task {} is reserved for scanning terminal {}
predicate_mappings.secondary_check_triggered: a secondary check is triggered for {}

create_activate_release_task.description: create and activate a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only create and activate a high risk release task A if it is not the case that the task A is active and it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I create and activate a high risk release task A, it is the case that the task A is active

assign_primary_pharmacist_and_reserve.description: assign a primary pharmacist B to a high risk release task A and reserve a pharmacist for the task
preconditions: I can only assign a primary pharmacist B to a high risk release task A and reserve a pharmacist for the task if it is the case that the task A is active and the pharmacist B is available and the primary pharmacist B is eligible for the release task A
I can only assign a primary pharmacist B to a high risk release task A and reserve a pharmacist for the task if it is not the case that a pharmacist is reserved for the task A
effects: Once I assign a primary pharmacist B to a high risk release task A and reserve a pharmacist for the task, it is the case that the primary pharmacist B is assigned to the task A and a pharmacist is reserved for the task A
Once I assign a primary pharmacist B to a high risk release task A and reserve a pharmacist for the task, it is not the case anymore that the pharmacist B is available

unassign_primary_pharmacist_and_release.description: unassign a primary pharmacist B from a high risk release task A and release the pharmacist for other tasks
preconditions: I can only unassign a primary pharmacist B from a high risk release task A and release the pharmacist for other tasks if it is the case that the primary pharmacist B is assigned to the task A

I can only unassign a primary pharmacist B from a high risk release task A and release the pharmacist for other tasks if it is not the case that the clinical verification flag is set for A and it is not the case that the secondary check is completed for A
effects: Once I unassign a primary pharmacist B from a high risk release task A and release the pharmacist for other tasks, it is the case that the pharmacist B is available

Once I unassign a primary pharmacist B from a high risk release task A and release the pharmacist for other tasks, it is not the case anymore that the primary pharmacist B is assigned to the task A and it is not the case anymore that a pharmacist is reserved for the task A and it is not the case anymore that a witness confirmed A and it is not the case anymore that a quality document is attached to A and it is not the case anymore that the witness signature for A is recorded and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for final signoff and it is not the case anymore that a secondary check is triggered for A

reserve_scanning_terminal.description: reserve a scanning terminal B for a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only reserve a scanning terminal B for a high risk release task A if it is the case that the task A is active and the scanning terminal B is available
effects: Once I reserve a scanning terminal B for a high risk release task A, it is the case that the task A is reserved for scanning terminal B
Once I reserve a scanning terminal B for a high risk release task A, it is not the case anymore that the scanning terminal B is available

release_scanning_terminal.description: release a scanning terminal B from a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only release a scanning terminal B from a high risk release task A if it is the case that the task A is reserved for scanning terminal B
effects: Once I release a scanning terminal B from a high risk release task A, it is the case that the scanning terminal B is available
Once I release a scanning terminal B from a high risk release task A, it is not the case anymore that the task A is reserved for scanning terminal B

use_scanning_terminal_for_check.description: use a scanning terminal B for checking a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only use a scanning terminal B for checking a high risk release task A if it is the case that the task A is active and a pharmacist is reserved for the task A and the task A is reserved for scanning terminal B
I can only use a scanning terminal B for checking a high risk release task A if it is not the case that a witness confirmed A
effects: Once I use a scanning terminal B for checking a high risk release task A, it is the case that a witness confirmed A

record_nurse_witness_signature.description: record signature of a nurse witness B for a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only record signature of a nurse witness B for a high risk release task A if it is the case that the task A is active and a pharmacist is reserved for the task A and the nurse witness B is available
I can only record signature of a nurse witness B for a high risk release task A if it is not the case that a witness confirmed A
effects: Once I record signature of a nurse witness B for a high risk release task A, it is the case that a witness confirmed A and the witness signature for A is recorded
Once I record signature of a nurse witness B for a high risk release task A, it is not the case anymore that the nurse witness B is available

attach_quality_document_and_mark.description: attach a quality document C to a high risk release task A and mark at a scanning terminal B
preconditions: I can only attach a quality document C to a high risk release task A and mark at a scanning terminal B if it is the case that a witness confirmed A and a pharmacist is reserved for the task A and the task A is reserved for scanning terminal B and the quality document C is available
I can only attach a quality document C to a high risk release task A and mark at a scanning terminal B if it is not the case that a quality document is attached to A
effects: Once I attach a quality document C to a high risk release task A and mark at a scanning terminal B, it is the case that a quality document is attached to A
Once I attach a quality document C to a high risk release task A and mark at a scanning terminal B, it is not the case anymore that the witness signature for A is recorded

apply_authorization_document_check.description: apply authorization document check on a high risk release task A with an authorization document B
preconditions: I can only apply authorization document check on a high risk release task A with an authorization document B if it is the case that a pharmacist is reserved for the task A and the authorization document B is attached to the release task A
I can only apply authorization document check on a high risk release task A with an authorization document B if it is not the case that a quality document is attached to A
effects: Once I apply authorization document check on a high risk release task A with an authorization document B, it is the case that a quality document is attached to A
Once I apply authorization document check on a high risk release task A with an authorization document B, it is not the case anymore that the witness signature for A is recorded

reserve_drug_lot.description: reserve a drug lot B for a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only reserve a drug lot B for a high risk release task A if it is the case that the task A is active and the drug lot B is available and the release task A can reserve the drug lot B
effects: Once I reserve a drug lot B for a high risk release task A, it is the case that A is a task reserved for the drug lot B
Once I reserve a drug lot B for a high risk release task A, it is not the case anymore that the drug lot B is available

release_drug_lot.description: release a drug lot B from a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only release a drug lot B from a high risk release task A if it is the case that A is a task reserved for the drug lot B
effects: Once I release a drug lot B from a high risk release task A, it is the case that the drug lot B is available
Once I release a drug lot B from a high risk release task A, it is not the case anymore that A is a task reserved for the drug lot B

reserve_dispensing_location.description: reserve a dispensing location B for a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only reserve a dispensing location B for a high risk release task A if it is the case that the task A is active and the dispensing location B is available and the release task A can reserve the dispensing location B
effects: Once I reserve a dispensing location B for a high risk release task A, it is the case that A is a task reserved for the dispensing location B
Once I reserve a dispensing location B for a high risk release task A, it is not the case anymore that the dispensing location B is available

release_dispensing_location.description: release a dispensing location B from a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only release a dispensing location B from a high risk release task A if it is the case that A is a task reserved for the dispensing location B
effects: Once I release a dispensing location B from a high risk release task A, it is the case that the dispensing location B is available
Once I release a dispensing location B from a high risk release task A, it is not the case anymore that A is a task reserved for the dispensing location B

reserve_administration_protocol.description: reserve an administration protocol B for a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only reserve an administration protocol B for a high risk release task A if it is the case that the task A is active and the administration protocol B is available and the release task A can reserve the protocol B
effects: Once I reserve an administration protocol B for a high risk release task A, it is the case that A is a task reserved for the administration protocol B
Once I reserve an administration protocol B for a high risk release task A, it is not the case anymore that the administration protocol B is available

release_administration_protocol.description: release an administration protocol B from a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only release an administration protocol B from a high risk release task A if it is the case that A is a task reserved for the administration protocol B
effects: Once I release an administration protocol B from a high risk release task A, it is the case that the administration protocol B is available
Once I release an administration protocol B from a high risk release task A, it is not the case anymore that A is a task reserved for the administration protocol B

reserve_prescriber_link.description: reserve a prescriber B link for a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only reserve a prescriber B link for a high risk release task A if it is the case that the task A is active and the prescriber B is available and the release task A is associated with the prescriber B
effects: Once I reserve a prescriber B link for a high risk release task A, it is the case that A is a task linked to the prescriber B
Once I reserve a prescriber B link for a high risk release task A, it is not the case anymore that the prescriber B is available

release_prescriber_link.description: release a prescriber B link from a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only release a prescriber B link from a high risk release task A if it is the case that A is a task linked to the prescriber B
effects: Once I release a prescriber B link from a high risk release task A, it is the case that the prescriber B is available
Once I release a prescriber B link from a high risk release task A, it is not the case anymore that A is a task linked to the prescriber B

perform_order_clinical_verification.description: perform clinical verification for a high risk release task A linked to a medication order B with a drug lot C at a dispensing location D
preconditions: I can only perform clinical verification for a high risk release task A linked to a medication order B with a drug lot C at a dispensing location D if it is the case that a pharmacist is reserved for the task A and A is a task reserved for the drug lot C and A is a task reserved for the dispensing location D and the medication order B is active and the release task A is linked to the medication order B

I can only perform clinical verification for a high risk release task A linked to a medication order B with a drug lot C at a dispensing location D if it is not the case that the clinical verification flag is set for A
effects: Once I perform clinical verification for a high risk release task A linked to a medication order B with a drug lot C at a dispensing location D, it is the case that A is a release task marked approved for the medication order B and the clinical verification flag is set for A

Once I perform clinical verification for a high risk release task A linked to a medication order B with a drug lot C at a dispensing location D, it is not the case anymore that the medication order B is active

perform_order_clinical_verification_with.description: perform clinical verification with protocol for a high risk release task A linked to a medication order B using an administration protocol C for a patient identifier D
preconditions: I can only perform clinical verification with protocol for a high risk release task A linked to a medication order B using an administration protocol C for a patient identifier D if it is the case that a pharmacist is reserved for the task A and A is a task reserved for the administration protocol C and the patient identifier D is available and the medication order B is active and the release task A is linked to the medication order B and the release task A is linked to the patient identifier D

I can only perform clinical verification with protocol for a high risk release task A linked to a medication order B using an administration protocol C for a patient identifier D if it is not the case that the clinical verification flag is set for A
effects: Once I perform clinical verification with protocol for a high risk release task A linked to a medication order B using an administration protocol C for a patient identifier D, it is the case that A is a release task marked approved for the medication order B and the clinical verification flag is set for A and a secondary check is triggered for A and the witness signature for A is recorded

Once I perform clinical verification with protocol for a high risk release task A linked to a medication order B using an administration protocol C for a patient identifier D, it is not the case anymore that the medication order B is active and it is not the case anymore that the patient identifier D is available

clear_secondary_check_trigger.description: clear secondary check trigger for a high risk release task A associated with a drug lot B at a dispensing location C
preconditions: I can only clear secondary check trigger for a high risk release task A associated with a drug lot B at a dispensing location C if it is the case that the clinical verification flag is set for A and a secondary check is triggered for A and A is a task reserved for the drug lot B and A is a task reserved for the dispensing location C
effects: Once I clear secondary check trigger for a high risk release task A associated with a drug lot B at a dispensing location C, it is not the case anymore that a secondary check is triggered for A and it is not the case anymore that the witness signature for A is recorded

complete_secondary_check_with_pharmacy_w.description: complete secondary check for a high risk release task A with a pharmacy witness staff D associated with a drug lot B at a dispensing location C
preconditions: I can only complete secondary check for a high risk release task A with a pharmacy witness staff D associated with a drug lot B at a dispensing location C if it is the case that a quality document is attached to A and the clinical verification flag is set for A and A is a task reserved for the drug lot B and A is a task reserved for the dispensing location C and the task role D is available for the release task A

I can only complete secondary check for a high risk release task A with a pharmacy witness staff D associated with a drug lot B at a dispensing location C if it is not the case that the witness signature for A is recorded and it is not the case that the secondary check is completed for A
effects: Once I complete secondary check for a high risk release task A with a pharmacy witness staff D associated with a drug lot B at a dispensing location C, it is the case that the secondary check is completed for A

complete_secondary_check_with_secondary_.description: complete secondary check for a high risk release task A with a secondary checker D associated with an administration protocol B and linked to a prescriber C
preconditions: I can only complete secondary check for a high risk release task A with a secondary checker D associated with an administration protocol B and linked to a prescriber C if it is the case that a quality document is attached to A and the clinical verification flag is set for A and A is a task reserved for the administration protocol B and A is a task linked to the prescriber C and the task role D is available for the release task A

I can only complete secondary check for a high risk release task A with a secondary checker D associated with an administration protocol B and linked to a prescriber C if it is not the case that the secondary check is completed for A
effects: Once I complete secondary check for a high risk release task A with a secondary checker D associated with an administration protocol B and linked to a prescriber C, it is the case that the secondary check is completed for A and the witness signature for A is recorded

finalize_checks_and_mark_ready.description: finalize checks and mark a high risk release task A ready for final signoff with a drug lot B at a dispensing location C
preconditions: I can only finalize checks and mark a high risk release task A ready for final signoff with a drug lot B at a dispensing location C if it is the case that the secondary check is completed for A and the witness signature for A is recorded and A is a task reserved for the drug lot B and A is a task reserved for the dispensing location C
effects: Once I finalize checks and mark a high risk release task A ready for final signoff with a drug lot B at a dispensing location C, it is the case that A is ready for final signoff

Once I finalize checks and mark a high risk release task A ready for final signoff with a drug lot B at a dispensing location C, it is not the case anymore that the witness signature for A is recorded and it is not the case anymore that a quality document is attached to A and it is not the case anymore that a secondary check is triggered for A

use_scanner_in_ready_state_attach_qualit.description: use a scanning terminal B in ready state to attach a quality document C to a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only use a scanning terminal B in ready state to attach a quality document C to a high risk release task A if it is the case that A is ready for final signoff and the secondary check is completed for A and a pharmacist is reserved for the task A and the task A is reserved for scanning terminal B and the quality document C is available
I can only use a scanning terminal B in ready state to attach a quality document C to a high risk release task A if it is not the case that a quality document is attached to A
effects: Once I use a scanning terminal B in ready state to attach a quality document C to a high risk release task A, it is the case that a quality document is attached to A

mark_device_scan_verified.description: mark device scan as verified for a high risk release task A using a scanning terminal B
preconditions: I can only mark device scan as verified for a high risk release task A using a scanning terminal B if it is the case that the secondary check is completed for A and a quality document is attached to A and the task A is reserved for scanning terminal B

I can only mark device scan as verified for a high risk release task A using a scanning terminal B if it is not the case that the witness signature for A is recorded and it is not the case that the device scan is verified for A
effects: Once I mark device scan as verified for a high risk release task A using a scanning terminal B, it is the case that the device scan is verified for A

record_nurse_witness_for_device_scan.description: record nurse witness a nurse witness B for device scan of a high risk release task A
preconditions: I can only record nurse witness a nurse witness B for device scan of a high risk release task A if it is the case that the secondary check is completed for A and a quality document is attached to A and the nurse witness B is available

I can only record nurse witness a nurse witness B for device scan of a high risk release task A if it is not the case that the witness signature for A is recorded and it is not the case that the device scan is verified for A
effects: Once I record nurse witness a nurse witness B for device scan of a high risk release task A, it is the case that the device scan is verified for A
Once I record nurse witness a nurse witness B for device scan of a high risk release task A, it is not the case anymore that the nurse witness B is available

attach_authorization_to_task_via_doc.description: attach an authorization document B to a high risk release task A via document
preconditions: I can only attach an authorization document B to a high risk release task A via document if it is the case that the device scan is verified for A and the authorization document B is available and A can attach the authorization document B
effects: Once I attach an authorization document B to a high risk release task A via document, it is the case that the release task A is linked to the authorization document B
Once I attach an authorization document B to a high risk release task A via document, it is not the case anymore that the authorization document B is available

variant_b_record_authorization.description: record authorization for a release task variant b A using an authorization document C linked to a release task variant a release task variant a B
preconditions: I can only record authorization for a release task variant b A using an authorization document C linked to a release task variant a release task variant a B if it is the case that the task A is active and the release task variant b is A and A requires the authorization document C and the release task B is linked to the authorization document C

I can only record authorization for a release task variant b A using an authorization document C linked to a release task variant a release task variant a B if it is not the case that the authorization document C is attached to the release task A
effects: Once I record authorization for a release task variant b A using an authorization document C linked to a release task variant a release task variant a B, it is the case that the authorization document C is attached to the release task A

record_quality_review_for_variant.description: record quality review for a release task A using a scanning terminal B with a quality document C
preconditions: I can only record quality review for a release task A using a scanning terminal B with a quality document C if it is the case that the task A is active and the release task variant b is A and a quality document is attached to A and the device scan is verified for A and the task A is reserved for scanning terminal B and the quality document C is available
I can only record quality review for a release task A using a scanning terminal B with a quality document C if it is not the case that the quality review for the release task A is completed
effects: Once I record quality review for a release task A using a scanning terminal B with a quality document C, it is the case that the quality review for the release task A is completed

final_signoff_variant_a.description: perform final signoff for variant a of a release task A
preconditions: I can only perform final signoff for variant a of a release task A if it is the case that the release task variant a is A and the task A is active and a pharmacist is reserved for the task A and the clinical verification flag is set for A and the secondary check is completed for A and the device scan is verified for A and a quality document is attached to A
I can only perform final signoff for variant a of a release task A if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I perform final signoff for variant a of a release task A, it is the case that A is finalized

final_signoff_with_authorization.description: perform final signoff with authorization for a release task A using an authorization document B
preconditions: I can only perform final signoff with authorization for a release task A using an authorization document B if it is the case that the release task variant b is A and the task A is active and a pharmacist is reserved for the task A and the clinical verification flag is set for A and the secondary check is completed for A and the device scan is verified for A and a quality document is attached to A and the authorization document B is attached to the release task A
I can only perform final signoff with authorization for a release task A using an authorization document B if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I perform final signoff with authorization for a release task A using an authorization document B, it is the case that A is finalized

final_signoff_with_quality_review.description: perform final signoff with quality review for a release task A
preconditions: I can only perform final signoff with quality review for a release task A if it is the case that the release task variant b is A and the task A is active and a pharmacist is reserved for the task A and the clinical verification flag is set for A and the secondary check is completed for A and the device scan is verified for A and a quality document is attached to A and the quality review for the release task A is completed
I can only perform final signoff with quality review for a release task A if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I perform final signoff with quality review for a release task A, it is the case that A is finalized

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a high risk release task or a primary pharmacist or a medication order or a dispensing location or a drug lot or a administration protocol or a scanning terminal or a nurse witness or a authorization document or a quality document or a patient identifier or a prescriber or a staff role is also a object
Everything that is a pharmacy witness staff or a secondary checker is also a staff role
Everything that is a release task variant a or a release task variant b is also a high risk release task
